# Geotecnia1 — Alto Hospicio

> Geotechnical engineering services in Alto Hospicio, Chile.

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Alto Hospicio, Chile.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
